title: Plan Sync fix, download overlay cleanup, marketing mobile buttons
description:
PipeSync Plan Sync button works again (missing action context wiring). Plan download/upload shows only the top popup progress HUD — the duplicate inline bar under Plan view was removed. Marketing site mobile header shows centered PIPESHARE / PIPESYNC chips.

Who is affected: PipeSync users on pipeshare.live (Plan Sync, plan downloads); marketing visitors on mobile.
changeLog: Fix Plan Sync button — wire buildPlanViewDataActionCtx for plan-view data actions.
Remove duplicate inline plan transfer progress bar; keep top popup HUD only.
Marketing mobile: centered PIPESHARE / PIPESYNC header chips (hp3).
Cache bust hl48 for PipeSync assets.
